speaker: narrator
subtitle_zh: 你没有5分钟了，但你很有勇气
voice_text_en: You do not have five minutes. Still, the confidence is impressive.
delivery: British male narrator, dry and faintly amused; state the bad news plainly, then let the final compliment land as restrained sarcasm

speaker: xiaoying
delivery: sharp female system bark, abrupt and irritated, with no warmth

speaker: xiaoying
subtitle_zh: 等等等等，你想翘课？没门！我不会让你签上的！
voice_text_en: Wait, wait, wait. You are trying to skip class? Absolutely not. I am not letting you check in.
delivery: female system voice, incredulous interruption followed by officious refusal; quick opening, clipped final sentence

speaker: xiaoying
subtitle_zh: 找你的数字去吧哈哈哈
voice_text_en: Go find your digits. All four of them. Ha.
delivery: smug female system voice, controlled mockery; pause before the short dismissive laugh

speaker: system
subtitle_zh: 余额暂时不足以购买尊严
voice_text_en: Current balance: insufficient to purchase dignity.
delivery: deadpan female system notice, neutral administrative cadence with a dry final stress on dignity

speaker: system
subtitle_zh: 校园网已经尽力了，你也是
voice_text_en: The campus network has done its best. Regrettably, so have you.
delivery: weary female system report; factual first sentence, resigned and cutting second sentence

speaker: xiaoying
voice_text_en: Yes, I know. Mobile data is beyond the budget.
delivery: impatient female aside, tired familiarity rather than sympathy

speaker: system
delivery: dry female observation, brief pause after the count, restrained delight in the player's frustration

speaker: xiaoying
delivery: female system voice with false enthusiasm collapsing into weary disappointment
